overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of Times Square at sunset, featuring Spider-Man periodically appearing on a building ledge overlooking the bustling intersection filled with yellow taxis and illuminated by massive animated digital billboards.

segments.scene_description: Elevated view of Times Square at golden hour, showcasing massive digital billboards on surrounding buildings. Spider-Man periodically appears crouched on the left building ledge while yellow taxis navigate the intersection below. The warm sunset lighting mixes with the artificial glow of the advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady elevated perspective of Times Square, capturing the vibrant intersection as the golden hour light blends with the artificial glow of the city. It begins with a wide view of massive digital billboards and yellow taxis navigating the streets below, while Spider-Man periodically appears crouched on a building ledge to the left. As the camera lingers, the digital advertisements cycle through various displays, shifting the colors of the urban atmosphere while the traffic flow remains moderate. The scene then persists in this high vantage point, with the warm sunset tones deepening across the landscape as Spider-Man continues his intermittent appearances. Finally, the shot concludes with a steady gaze over the bustling intersection, where the golden light and neon displays merge into a singular, glowing cityscape.
